meta.title: asc — App Store Connect CLI
meta.description: Open-source command-line tool for App Store Connect. Submit apps, manage versions, upload screenshots, and more — all from your terminal. AI-agent ready with CAEOAS affordances.
meta.keywords: app store connect cli, asc, swift cli, appstoreconnect, submit app, homebrew, open source

hero.subtitle: A Swift CLI for managing your iOS and macOS apps on App Store Connect. Submit versions, manage screenshots, track builds — with full AI-agent support via CAEOAS affordances.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: Built on the official App Store Connect API, with a clean three-layer architecture and full affordance output for AI agent workflows.

feature1.title: AI-Agent Ready (CAEOAS)
feature1.description: Every response embeds ready-to-run next commands in an affordances field. No agent needs to know the full command tree — it just follows the links.

feature2.title: Persistent Auth Login
feature2.description: Log in once with asc auth login. Credentials are saved to ~/.asc/credentials.json and picked up automatically by every command — no environment variables required per session.
feature2.comment2: # no env vars needed from now on

feature3.title: Full Resource Hierarchy
feature3.description: Manage the complete App Store Connect resource tree: Apps → Versions → Localizations → Screenshot Sets → Screenshots. Plus Builds and TestFlight.

feature4.icon: <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 16.5v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18.75V16.5m-13.5-9L12 3m0 0l4.5 4.5M12 3v13.5"/></svg>
feature4.title: One-Command Submission
feature4.description: Submit any iOS or macOS version for App Store review with a single command. The CLI handles the full multi-step review submission flow automatically.

feature5.icon: <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6.75 7.5l3 2.25-3 2.25m4.5 0h3m-9 8.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18V6a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 003 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 002.25 2.25z"/></svg>
feature5.title: Multiple Output Formats
feature5.description: Designed for both humans and machines. Output as JSON (default), table, or markdown. Pipe into jq, scripts, or AI agents with ease.

feature6.title: Pre-flight Check Readiness
feature6.description: Run all submission checks in one command before you hit submit. Catches missing builds, unconfigured pricing, and incomplete localizations — with MUST FIX vs SHOULD FIX severity. The submit affordance only appears when everything is green.

feature7.title: Version Localizations
feature7.description: Update per-locale What's New text, description, keywords, and promotional URLs for any app version. Full CRUD — list, create, and update across all supported locales.

feature8.title: Screenshots
feature8.description: Create screenshot sets for any display size and upload PNG images via the 3-step ASC upload flow. Supports all iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple TV display types.

feature9.title: App Previews
feature9.description: Upload video previews (.mp4, .mov, .m4v) with optional thumbnail timecode. The CLI handles the complete 3-step upload flow: reserve, chunk upload, and MD5 confirm.

feature10.title: App Info Localizations
feature10.description: Read and write per-locale app metadata: name, subtitle, and privacy policy URL. App-level metadata that applies across all versions — separate from version localizations.

feature11.icon: <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 16.5V9.75m0 0l3 3m-3-3l-3 3M6.75 19.5a4.5 4.5 0 01-1.41-8.775 5.25 5.25 0 0110.338-2.323 3.75 3.75 0 013.316 4.098A4.5 4.5 0 0118 19.5H6.75z"/></svg>
feature11.title: Builds Upload
feature11.description: Upload IPA/PKG via the 5-step ASC upload flow: reserve slot, upload chunks, confirm MD5, then poll for processing. Includes list, get, and delete for upload records.

feature12.title: TestFlight
feature12.description: Manage beta groups and testers: add or remove by email, bulk import/export via CSV, distribute builds to groups, and update What's New notes per locale.

feature13.title: In-App Purchases
feature13.description: Create consumable, non-consumable, and non-renewing subscription IAPs. Set per-territory pricing from App Store price points, manage per-locale name and description, and submit for review.

feature14.title: Auto-Renewable Subscriptions
feature14.description: Create subscription groups and tiers (weekly to yearly). Manage introductory offers (free trial, pay-as-you-go, pay-up-front), per-locale metadata, and submit for review.

feature15.title: Code Signing
feature15.description: Manage the full signing chain: register bundle IDs, create certificates from CSR, register devices by UDID, and create or delete provisioning profiles — all from the terminal.

feature16.title: Interactive TUI Mode
feature16.description: Run asc tui for a full terminal UI browser. Navigate Apps, Versions, Builds, and TestFlight with arrow keys — no commands to memorize. Perfect for exploration and discovery.

step1.title: Install via Homebrew
step1.description: One command installs the latest release. No Xcode or Swift toolchain required.

step2.title: Log in once, run forever
step2.description: Save your API key with asc auth login. Credentials are stored in ~/.asc/credentials.json — no environment variables needed per session.

step3.title: Start managing your apps
step3.description: List apps, inspect versions, upload screenshots, and submit for review — all from your terminal or from an AI agent.

cta.title: Automate your App Store Connect workflow

appWall.title: App Wall
appWall.subtitle: Real apps on the App Store published by developers using asc CLI.
appWall.ctaHint: Edit homepage/apps.json and open a pull request →
appWall.empty: No apps yet — be the first to submit!

footer.description: Open-source CLI tool for App Store Connect. Built with Swift.
